title: Image selector agent input
description: Input JSON for ImageSelectorAgent._load_input (slides with title, description, and image options). Unknown root properties are ignored at runtime.

slides.description: One entry per selection step. Omitted title/description/images use defaults in code.

title.description: Slide heading; defaults to "Untitled Slide" if omitted.

description.description: Slide body text; defaults to empty string if omitted.

images.description: Selectable images; defaults to empty if omitted.

imageItem.description: Fields default to empty string or empty array if omitted.

url.description: Remote image URL; empty values are skipped when downloading.
